steps.title: Find the contrasting purposes in the notes
steps.content: Crab spiders use mimicry to ambush prey; katydids use it to hide from predators. The student's goal is to highlight this functional difference.

steps.title: Select the choice that shows this contrast
steps.content:
Choice C explicitly contrasts the two animals' uses of mimicry: ambush versus hiding. Choices A and B don't address the functional difference, and D ignores the specific animals.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
